# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-microservice
        image: <Your Docker Image Name>
        env:
          - name: MONGO_URL
            value: "mongodb://mongo:27017/mydb"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  selector:
    app: nodejs-microservice
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
